overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking through a moonlit forest trail, encountering riders on horseback, and discovering an abandoned campsite with an overturned wagon and dead bodies. The atmosphere is tense and mysterious with cool blue moonlight illuminating the wilderness.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit forest trail with tall pine trees on both sides and a stream running alongside the path. A group of riders on horseback passes by the camera around the 6-second mark, moving along the same trail.

events.description: campfire light becomes visible in the distance through the trees

agents.ego_description: continuing through the forest toward the distant campfire

entered.detail: orange glow of a campfire visible through the trees
large rock outcropping on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the forest opens up slightly, revealing a distant campfire glow ahead. The stream falls behind as the trail leads toward a rock formation on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned campsite with wagon and dead bodies

character slows to examine the bodies and scattered supplies

dead body lying near the wagon wheel
dead body lying on the ground to the left of the path
open supply chest with contents spilled on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an abandoned campsite where an overturned wagon sits beside a burning campfire. As the camera moves closer, dead bodies become visible on the ground near scattered supplies and an open chest, suggesting a violent encounter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit forest trail that gradually transitions from a serene wilderness into a scene of violent aftermath. It begins along a path flanked by tall pine trees and a running stream, where a group of riders on horseback passes by. As the character continues forward, the forest opens up and the stream recedes, revealing a distant campfire glow and a rock formation on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the source of the light, approaching an abandoned campsite centered around an overturned wagon and a burning fire. Finally, the camera moves closer to reveal dead bodies strewn across the ground near scattered supplies and an open chest.
